description: Datumbox provides a machine learning and natural language processing service focused on text analysis tasks such as sentiment analysis, topic classification, language detection, keyword extraction, and document similarity. Its public site describes the API as a web service for use from websites, software, and mobile applications.
summary: Datumbox exposes one REST-style HTTP API for machine-learning and text-analysis functions, authenticated with a Datumbox-issued API key passed in POST form data.
